title: Fuzzer: Segfault after unsupported struct/union
body:
---


Author Name: **Eric Rippey**
Original Redmine Issue: 1573 from https://www.veripool.org

Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

Running the attached testcase with:

verilator_bin --lint-only 1.sv

With version:

Verilator 4.020 devel rev v4.020-40-gbaa6a2c

Produces:
```
%Error: 1.sv:2: Unsupported: Initial values in struct/union members.
=0,e
 ^
Segmentation fault (core dumped)

```
